title: zziplib security update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.13.71-12]
- Fix a directory traversal issue in unzip-mem
  Resolves: RHEL-6266
full_text:

  Resolves: RHEL-6266
